# thoth_policy_bundle (Resource)

Manages versioned OPA/Cedar policy bundles for runtime sidecar enforcement.

## Example Usage

```hcl
resource "thoth_policy_bundle" "standard_dlp_opa" {
  name        = "standard-dlp"
  description = "Customer-agnostic purpose/sensitivity DLP baseline"
  framework   = "OPA"
  raw_policy  = file("${path.module}/policies/opa-standard-dlp.rego")
  enforcement_mode = "enforce"
}

resource "thoth_policy_bundle" "least_privilege_cedar" {
  name        = "least-privilege-analyst"
  description = "Tier-targeted least-privilege baseline"
  framework   = "CEDAR"
  raw_policy  = file("${path.module}/policies/cedar-least-privilege-analyst.cedar")
  assignments = ["agent:security-analyst-agent", "agent:coding-agent"]
  enforcement_mode = "enforce"
}

resource "thoth_policy_bundle" "enterprise_standard" {
  name          = "global-governance"
  framework     = "OPA"
  source_uri    = "s3://atensec-governance-us-west-2/v2.4.1/standard.rego"
  s3_version_id = "3Lg....optionalVersionId"
  expected_hash = "sha256:e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855"
  assignments   = ["all"]
  enforcement_mode = "enforce"
}

resource "thoth_policy_bundle" "pilot_local_file" {
  name        = "pilot-dev-local"
  framework   = "OPA"
  source_uri  = "file:///etc/thoth/policies/pilot.rego"
  enforcement_mode = "observe"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `framework` (String) Policy framework: OPA or CEDAR.
- `name` (String) Stable bundle name. Updates create a new version for the same name.
- `raw_policy` (String, Sensitive) Raw Rego/Cedar policy payload. Set this or source_uri/s3_uri.

### Optional

- `assignments` (Set of String) Assignment targets (for example: all, agent:security-analyst-agent, coding-agent). Defaults to `["all"]`.
- `description` (String) Optional policy bundle description.
- `enforcement_mode` (String) Customer-facing policy mode: enforce or observe. Defaults to enforce.
- `expected_hash` (String) Optional expected SHA-256 hash (hex or sha256:<hex>) to enforce policy integrity.
- `s3_uri` (String) Legacy S3 source URI containing policy payload (for example: s3://bucket/path/policy.rego). Set this or raw_policy. Prefer source_uri.
- `s3_version_id` (String) Optional S3 object version ID to pin deterministic policy enforcement.
- `source_uri` (String) Unified policy source URI (`file://` or `s3://`). Set this or raw_policy.
- `status` (String) Bundle lifecycle status: active, staged, paused, or disabled (alias of paused). Defaults to active.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `created_by` (String) Creator identity.
- `id` (String) Policy bundle ID.
- `policy_hash` (String) SHA-256 hash of framework + raw policy content.
- `resolved_version` (String) Resolved immutable source version (for example, S3 version ID or file revision hint).
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `version` (Number) Monotonic policy bundle version.
